name: ar-io-solana-attestor
description: Yarn workspaces monorepo: the ar.io escrow attestor service, the ar-io-claims centralized dispenser, and the shared verification-pure crypto library they both build on.

scripts.build: yarn build:canonical && yarn workspace @ar.io/escrow-attestor build && yarn workspace @ar.io/claims build
scripts.typecheck: yarn build:canonical && yarn workspaces run typecheck
scripts.lint: yarn build:canonical && yarn workspaces run lint
scripts.test: yarn build:canonical && yarn workspaces run test
